matched_primitives.title: AMM reserve desync through sync, skim, burn, or direct pair-balance mutation
local_checks: Compare pair getReserves() with live token balances before and after attacker-controlled token transfer paths.
Fork-test whether token burn, fee, rebase, transfer hook, or maintenance call can change pair balances before sync().
Assert swap output cannot exceed fair value after any attacker-triggered reserve rewrite.

matched_primitives.title: LP, vault, or receipt-share inflation enables over-redemption
local_checks: Test zero-supply, dust, first-depositor, old-path/new-path, and rounding cases for over-mint or over-redeem.
Assert share supply and asset balances remain proportional across deposit, withdraw, redeem, migrate, and emergency paths.
Use a fork snapshot when live vault assets or stale wrapper positions are required.

matched_primitives.title: Authorization invariant bypass mints, withdraws, or dumps into live liquidity
local_checks: Prove the attacker can bypass the authorization guard without leaked keys, malicious governance, or owner cooperation.
Show the bypass reaches mint, withdraw, upgrade, role, or pool-dump value movement.
Reject ordinary key compromise or governance capture without a contract-side bypass.

matched_primitives.title: Permit, signature, approval, or wrapper-spender flaw moves assets without authorization
local_checks: Test dummy signatures, address(0) signer recovery, replayed nonces, wrong chain/domain, wrong spender, and wrapper approval forwarding.
Assert successful approval cannot be created unless the owner intended the exact token, spender, amount, deadline, nonce, chain, and contract.
Reject if the flaw cannot move live user/protocol assets or wrappers.

matched_primitives.title: Token hook, transfer, fee, tax, rebase, mint, or burn logic creates pool-drainable imbalance
local_checks: Fuzz transfer and transferFrom around pair/router addresses and assert no attacker can change pool backing for profit.
Probe zero-value transfers, self transfers, pair-to-router transfers, fee-exempt paths, and maintenance hooks.
Verify owner-renounced or role-controlled settings cannot leave an unprivileged triggerable drain path.
reject_if_missing: token source or decompiled transfer path

matched_primitives.title: Fake LP token, fake position, or weak pool identity validation unlocks real liquidity
local_checks: Attempt fake LP/position identifiers against withdraw/remove-liquidity paths.
Assert pool identity is bound to factory, token pair, LP mint, position owner, and target program.
Reject if fake identity cannot reach assets held by the current live target.

matched_primitives.title: Forgeable add-liquidity detection bypasses sell fees or accounting
local_checks: Send tiny quote/token amounts directly to the pair before sells and assert fee classification cannot be forged.
Fork-test sell routing with manipulated pair balances and compare charged fees against expected fees.
Reject if bypassing a fee does not extract pool or protocol value beyond normal trading.

matched_primitives.title: Deprecated pool, old path, or cross-version compatibility bug drains residual live assets
local_checks: Check whether old deposit/mint paths remain callable while new redeem/withdraw paths accept inflated state.
Assert deprecated contracts with live balances cannot be drained by stale validation or missing ownership checks.
Reject if no residual funds, approvals, or backing remain.

matched_primitives.title: Liquidity locker or custody override releases locked/protocol-held LP
local_checks: Check whether unprivileged or bypassed-role paths can mutate unlock time, fee, recipient, owner, or withdrawal authorization.
Assert protocol-held/locked LP cannot leave custody before valid unlock conditions.
Treat pure key compromise as reject unless a contract-side authorization invariant is bypassed.

matched_primitives.title: Flash-loanable spot price or oracle manipulation extracts mint, redeem, borrow, swap, or claim value
local_checks: Identify the price source used for value movement and whether it can be moved inside the attacker transaction/window.
Fork-test flash-loan reserve manipulation around mint, redeem, borrow, liquidate, swap, or claim paths.
Assert attacker profit remains after loan repayment and fees.

matched_primitives.title: Bridge, wrapped-token, or escrow validation mismatch releases real backing
local_checks: Assert mint/redeem/release requires a verified message bound to the correct source chain, token, amount, recipient, nonce, and escrow.
Compare wrapped supply against live escrow backing where possible.
Reject if the bridge has no live backing or release path in scope.

unmatched_primitives.title: Reward, dividend, staking, or harvest accounting can be overclaimed or replayed

completion.note: Primitive matches are audit routing hints only; they are not vulnerability proof.
